name: Tuna Pasta Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can Condensed cream of celery soup
1 can (6 1/2 oz) tuna, drained and flaked
2 cups Cooked corkscrew or other macaroni (1 Cup uncooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place peas in a small microwave-safe bowl. Cover with vented plastic wrap; Microwave on HIGH 1-2 minutes or until tender. Drain and set aside.
2. In a 1 1/2 quart microwave-safe casserole, stir soup and milk until smooth. Stir in cheese. Fold tuna, macaroni, eggs and peas into soup mixture.
3. Cover with lid; Microwave on HIGH 5-7 minutes or until hot and bubbling, stirring once during cooking. Let stand, covered, 5 minutes.
4. Sprinkle potato chips over casserole.
